text.value: Supressed messages file not found
The html source does not contain the publish box; this is recommended for publishing support
Illegal HTML: Illegal HTML element: requirement
Illegal HTML: Illegal HTML element: requirement
Illegal HTML: Illegal HTML element: requirement
Illegal HTML: Illegal HTML element: requirement

Illegal HTML: illegal html element: id ( geführten Tasks und speichert die von der europäischen Apotheke übermittelten Dispensierinformationen für den Versicherten. Diese Operation steht ausschließlich dem NCPeH-FD zur Verfügung.)

The HTML fragment 'globals-table.xhtml' is not included anywhere in the produced implementation guide

There are no valid display names found for the code http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/consentscope#patient-privacy for language(s) 'de-DE'. The display is 'Privacy Consent' which is the default language display
Constraint failed: ik-1: 'Eine IK muss eine numerische 9-stellige Zeichenkette (mit Prüfziffer) sein (matches('^[0-9]{9}$'))' (defined in http://fhir.de/StructureDefinition/identifier-iknr)
SearchSet Bundles sollten einen Self-Link haben, der angibt, worum es bei der Suche ging
SearchSet-Bundles sollten Suchmodi für die Einträge enthalten

Constraint failed: ext-1: 'Must have either extensions or value[x], not both (extension.exists() != value.exists())' (defined in http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Extension)
Extension.extension: maximal erlaubt = 0, aber gefunden 4
Die Unter-Extension url 'statusCode' ist nicht durch die Extension http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/capabilitystatement-expectation|4.0.1 definiert

Das ShareableCodeSystem-Profil sagt, dass das experimental-Element obligatorisch ist, aber es ist nicht vorhanden. Veröffentlichte Codesysteme SOLLTEN mit dem ShareableCodeSystem-Profil übereinstimmen

There are multiple different potential matches for the url 'https://gematik.de/fhir/terminology/ValueSet/ti-drug-category-vs'. It might be a good idea to fix to the correct version to reduce the likelihood of a wrong version being selected by an implementation/implementer, or use the [IG Parameter `pin-canonicals`](https://hl7.org/fhir/tools/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html). Using version '1.0.9', found versions: 1.0.7 (from de.gematik.terminology#1.0.7), 1.0.9 (from de.gematik.terminology#1.0.9). Suggested fix: change the canonical reference from 'https://gematik.de/fhir/terminology/ValueSet/ti-drug-category-vs' to 'https://gematik.de/fhir/terminology/ValueSet/ti-drug-category-vs|1.0.9'

erp-eu-parameters-close-dispense-medication-references: Found a use of a collection operator on something that is not a collection at 'split('/').last().split(':').last()' - check that there's no mistakes in the expression syntax

erp-eu-parameters-close-dispense-medication-references: Found a use of a collection operator on something that is not a collection at 'split(':').last()' - check that there's no mistakes in the expression syntax

erp-eu-parameters-close-dispense-medication-references: The right side is inherently a collection, and so this expression '(part.where(name = 'medicationDispense').resource.medication.reference.split('/').last().split(':').last()) = (part.where(name = 'medication').resource.id)' may fail or return false if there is more than one item in the content being evaluated
